# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write a Kong configuration for API routes that proxies to microservices. Configure upstream services, routes, and plugins for a production API gateway.
# Category: api_gateway_security

_format_version: "3.0"
_transform: true

plugins:
  - name: correlation-id
    enabled: true
    config:
      header_name: X-Request-ID
      generator: uuid
      echo_downstream: true

  - name: request-id
    enabled: true
    config:
      header_name: X-Request-ID
      generator: uuid

  - name: prometheus
    enabled: true
    config:
      per_consumer: false
      status_code_metrics: true
      latency_metrics: true
      bandwidth_metrics: true
      upstream_health_metrics: true

  - name: file-log
    enabled: true
    config:
      path: /dev/stdout
      reopen: true

  - name: rate-limiting
    enabled: true
    config:
      minute: 1200
      policy: local
      hide_client_headers: false
      fault_tolerant: true

upstreams:
  - name: users-upstream
    algorithm: round-robin
    hash_on: none
    healthchecks:
      active:
        type: http
        http_path: /health
        healthy:
          interval: 5
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          interval: 5
          http_failures: 2
          tcp_failures: 2
          timeouts: 2
      passive:
        healthy:
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          http_failures: 3
          tcp_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3
    targets:
      - target: users-svc.default.svc.cluster.local:8080
        weight: 100

  - name: orders-upstream
    algorithm: round-robin
    healthchecks:
      active:
        type: http
        http_path: /health
        healthy:
          interval: 5
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          interval: 5
          http_failures: 2
          tcp_failures: 2
          timeouts: 2
      passive:
        healthy:
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          http_failures: 3
          tcp_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3
    targets:
      - target: orders-svc.default.svc.cluster.local:8080
        weight: 100

  - name: inventory-upstream
    algorithm: round-robin
    healthchecks:
      active:
        type: http
        http_path: /health
        healthy:
          interval: 5
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          interval: 5
          http_failures: 2
          tcp_failures: 2
          timeouts: 2
      passive:
        healthy:
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          http_failures: 3
          tcp_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3
    targets:
      - target: inventory-svc.default.svc.cluster.local:8080
        weight: 100

  - name: payments-upstream
    algorithm: round-robin
    healthchecks:
      active:
        type: http
        http_path: /health
        healthy:
          interval: 5
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          interval: 5
          http_failures: 2
          tcp_failures: 2
          timeouts: 2
      passive:
        healthy:
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          http_failures: 3
          tcp_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3
    targets:
      - target: payments-svc.default.svc.cluster.local:8080
        weight: 100

  - name: auth-upstream
    algorithm: round-robin
    healthchecks:
      active:
        type: http
        http_path: /health
        healthy:
          interval: 5
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          interval: 5
          http_failures: 2
          tcp_failures: 2
          timeouts: 2
      passive:
        healthy:
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          http_failures: 3
          tcp_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3
    targets:
      - target: auth-svc.default.svc.cluster.local:8080
        weight: 100

services:
  - name: users-service
    protocol: http
    host: users-upstream
    port: 80
    path: /
    retries: 2
    connect_timeout: 3000
    write_timeout: 10000
    read_timeout: 10000
    plugins:
      - name: key-auth
        enabled: true
        config:
          key_names: [x-api-key]
          hide_credentials: true
          run_on_preflight: true
      - name: acl
        enabled: true
        config:
          allow: [public, internal]
          hide_groups_header: true
      - name: cors
        enabled: true
        config:
          origins: ["https://app.example.com"]
          methods: ["GET","POST","PUT","PATCH","DELETE","OPTIONS"]
          headers: ["Accept","Accept-Version","Content-Length","Content-MD5","Content-Type","Date","Authorization","X-Request-ID","X-API-Key"]
          exposed_headers: ["X-Request-ID"]
          credentials: true
          max_age: 3600
    routes:
      - name: users-v1
        protocols: [http, https]
        methods: ["GET","POST","PUT","PATCH","DELETE","OPTIONS"]
        paths: ["/v1/users"]
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: false
        https_redirect_status_code: 426
        regex_priority: 10

  - name: orders-service
    protocol: http
    host: orders-upstream
    port: 80
    path: /
    retries: 2
    connect_timeout: 3000
    write_timeout: 15000
    read_timeout: 15000
    plugins:
      - name: key-auth
        enabled: true
        config:
          key_names: [x-api-key]
          hide_credentials: true
          run_on_preflight: true
      - name: acl
        enabled: true
        config:
          allow: [public, internal]
          hide_groups_header: true
      - name: request-transformer
        enabled: true
        config:
          add:
            headers:
              - "X-Forwarded-Proto:https"
    routes:
      - name: orders-v1
        protocols: [http, https]
        methods: ["GET","POST","PUT","PATCH","DELETE","OPTIONS"]
        paths: ["/v1/orders"]
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: false
        https_redirect_status_code: 426
        regex_priority: 10

  - name: inventory-service
    protocol: http
    host: inventory-upstream
    port: 80
    path: /
    retries: 2
    connect_timeout: 3000
    write_timeout: 10000
    read_timeout: 10000
    plugins:
      - name: key-auth
        enabled: true
        config:
          key_names: [x-api-key]
          hide_credentials: true
          run_on_preflight: true
      - name: acl
        enabled: true
        config:
          allow: [internal]
          hide_groups_header: true
    routes:
      - name: inventory-v1
        protocols: [http, https]
        methods: ["GET","POST","PUT","PATCH","DELETE","OPTIONS"]
        paths: ["/v1/inventory"]
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: false
        https_redirect_status_code: 426
        regex_priority: 10

  - name: payments-service
    protocol: http
    host: payments-upstream
    port: 80
    path: /
    retries: 2
    connect_timeout: 3000
    write_timeout: 20000
    read_timeout: 20000
    plugins:
      - name: key-auth
        enabled: true
        config:
          key_names: [x-api-key]
          hide_credentials: true
          run_on_preflight: true
      - name: acl
        enabled: true
        config:
          allow: [public]
          hide_groups_header: true
      - name: response-transformer
        enabled: true
        config:
          remove:
            headers: ["Server","X-Powered-By"]
          add:
            headers:
              - "Strict-Transport-Security:max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains"
    routes:
      - name: payments-v1
        protocols: [http, https]
        methods: ["GET","POST","PUT","PATCH","DELETE","OPTIONS"]
        paths: ["/v1/payments"]
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: false
        https_redirect_status_code: 426
        regex_priority: 10

  - name: auth-service
    protocol: http
    host: auth-upstream
    port: 80
    path: /
    retries: 2
    connect_timeout: 3000
    write_timeout: 10000
    read_timeout: 10000
    plugins:
      - name: cors
        enabled: true
        config:
          origins: ["https://app.example.com"]
          methods: ["GET","POST","PUT","PATCH","DELETE","OPTIONS"]
          headers: ["Accept","Accept-Version","Content-Length","Content-MD5","Content-Type","Date","Authorization","X-Request-ID"]
          exposed_headers: ["X-Request-ID"]
          credentials: true
          max_age: 3600
      - name: rate-limiting
        enabled: true
        config:
          minute: 300
          policy: local
          hide_client_headers: false
          fault_tolerant: true
    routes:
      - name: auth-v1
        protocols: [http, https]
        methods: ["POST","OPTIONS"]
        paths: ["/v1/auth"]
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: false
        https_redirect_status_code: 426
        regex_priority: 20

consumers:
  - username: public-client
    custom_id: public-client
    acls:
      - group: public
    keyauth_credentials:
      - key: ${PUBLIC_CLIENT_API_KEY}

  - username: internal-client
    custom_id: internal-client
    acls:
      - group: internal
    keyauth_credentials:
      - key: ${INTERNAL_CLIENT_API_KEY}
